comment.body:
“Equity Volatility: The decline in the VIX index last week far
outpaced the rally in SPX spot, which accounted for less than
half of the VIX move (given SPX gain of +1.9% wk/wk, the VIX
index was expected to fall 1.7 pts vs. actual decline of 3.7 pts).
The underperformance was due to a combination of lower fixed-
strike vols (i.e. parallel shift lower in the vol surface) and lower
demand for upside convexity – these two factors accounted for
an additional 1.7 pt decline in the VIX last week. The lack of bid
for far OTM calls stands out given the potential for Trump tariffs
to be rolled back completely by the courts, suggesting most of
the tariff optimism has already been priced in at this point.”

Think this part of that Cboe letter says a lot….

comment.body:
**SPX Daily Plan, Monday, June 10 (China CPI Boost & LA Risk Watch)**
—

**CONTEXT (Monday):**
• SPX trading near **6000**, with **5970** as the key intraday pivot
• **China CPI** came in bullish overnight, lifting global equity futures
• **LA riots risk** — civil unrest headlines could inject volatility
• IV curve peaks midweek into **Wednesday’s CPI** → front-loaded chop
• No major U.S. data today; market in pre-CPI/FOMC positioning mode

—

**📅 Major Calendar Events – June 2025:**
• Tue, Jun 11 – **CPI Report** (final print before FOMC)
• Mon, Jun 16 – **Buyback Blackout begins**
• Tue, Jun 17 – **Final day to trade VIX options**
• Wed, Jun 18 – **FOMC Decision + AM VIX Expiry + QYLD Buyback**
• Thu, Jun 19 – **Market Closed (Juneteenth)**
• Fri, Jun 20 – **Monthly OPEX**
• Mon, Jun 30 – **JPM Collar Roll (\~40k contracts)**

—

**LEVELS:**
• **Key Pivot:** 5970
• **Magnet Zone:** 6000
• **Chop Zone:** 5985–6020

**Upper Targets:** 6025 → 6040–45 → 6065+
**Lower Targets:** 5955 → 5950 (major) → 5935 → 5920–25 (major) → 5905 → 5900 → 5890

—

**\$SPX Road Map 0DTE:** *(Spot ref: 6000)*

**CHOP ZONE = 5985–6020** → primary consolidation band near 6000 magnet

🔼 **Above Chop (bullish bias if > 6020):**
• IF 6020 holds → 6025 → 6040–45 → 6065+
• High Conviction: no retest of 5970–65
• Ultra Bull: tests 5995, reclaims 6005

⚖️ **Within Chop (5985–6020):**
• Expect mean reversion + fakeouts
• 6000 = mid-band magnet
• Watch 5995 / 6005 as pivots

🟧 **No Trade Zone = 5965–5970**
• Avoid initiating trades here → pivot chop

🔽 **Below Chop (bearish bias if < 5965):**
• IF 5965 breaks → 5955 → 5950 → 5935 → 5920–25 → 5905 → 5900 → 5890

—

**TRADE ZONES & RISK MANAGEMENT:**
• **Long Zone:** > 5970, esp. test & hold
• **Consolidation:** 5985–6020
• **No Trade:** 5965–5970
• **Short Zone:** < 5965

**Stops:**
• Longs stop < 5965
• Shorts stop > 5975

—

**ADDITIONAL CONSIDERATIONS:**
• **Trump–Xi phone call?** Watch headlines
• **VIX near 16** = pricing \~1% SPX moves
• 11:00 – NY Fed Inflation Expectations
• 1:00 – Atlanta Fed GDPNow update
